title: Gearworks
description: Gearworks helps you experience Create Mod at its fullest.
body:
# This project is no longer being updated. Check out the [New modpack!](https://modrinth.com/project/create-cog)

**GearWorks seamlessly combines the power of technology and magic**, giving you the freedom to choose your path to strength and advancement.


**Included Mods:**
> Create,
> Create Garnished,
> Simple Voice Chat,
> Create Slice and Dice,
> Create Structures,
> Create Enchantment Industry,!
> Create Goggles,
> Create Ore Excavation,
> Create Jetpack,
> Create Steam 'n' Rails,
> Create Crafts and Additions,
> Create Extended Cogwheels,
> Create Interiors,
> Create Misc and Things,

and other mods added every update! 



**Multiplayer and Singleplayer Options;**
This version is designed for optimal use on our dedicated Discord server, where you can join a vibrant community of players. Engage in collaborative projects and explore the modpack together. If you prefer a more solitary experience, you can enjoy GearWorks in Singleplayer mode.
## Thanks for supporting Gearworks.
